name: AeroStream Carbon X
shortDescription: Engineered for raw speed and aerodynamics. The ultimate carbon fiber racing machine.
description: The AeroStream Carbon X represents the pinnacle of aerodynamic engineering. Crafted with ultra-high modulus T800 carbon fiber, it slices through the wind while offering exceptional stiffness and responsiveness. Designed for competitive racers and speed enthusiasts who demand maximum performance without compromise.

specs.Frame: AeroStream T800 Monocoque Carbon, internal routing

features: Integrated carbon cockpit with hidden cable routing
Aerodynamically optimized tube profiles
Shimano Ultegra Di2 electronic shifting
Tubeless-ready 50mm carbon wheelset

name: Apex Trail 29er
shortDescription: Conquer any terrain with full-suspension stability and aggressive trail geometry.
description: Built for rugged adventure, the Apex Trail 29er handles technical descents and steep climbs with ease. Featuring 130mm of responsive front and rear travel, a modern slack head angle, and grippy tubeless-ready tires, this mountain bike gives you the confidence to push your limits on the trail.

specs.Frame: AL6061 Double Butted Alloy, 130mm travel linkage system
specs.Fork: RockShox Recon Silver RL, 130mm travel, Solo Air

features: Plush 130mm dual-suspension trail system
SRAM 1x12 Eagle drivetrain with wide-range cassette
Internal dropper seatpost for quick adjustment on the fly
Thru-axle boost spacing for maximum stiffness

name: Elysium Neo Smart E-Bike
shortDescription: Sleek, lightweight, and smart. Redefine your daily commute with effortless electric power.
description: The Elysium Neo hides its high-capacity battery within a ultra-minimalist alloy frame. Equipped with a whisper-quiet 250W rear hub motor and smart torque sensor, it delivers intuitive pedal-assist power exactly when you need it. An integrated LED display in the top tube keeps you informed in style.

specs.Frame: Premium Hydroformed Alloy, integrated internal battery
specs.Range: Up to 80 km per charge (pedal assist)

features: Invisible battery integration for a traditional bike look
Torque sensor technology for smooth, natural pedal assist
Top-tube integrated high-contrast LED matrix display
App connectivity with navigation and GPS tracking

name: Terra Gravel Elite
shortDescription: Endless roads, infinite possibilities. The ultimate explorer designed for gravel and dirt.
description: Escape the paved road on the Terra Gravel Elite. Featuring compliance-boosting geometry and multiple frame mounts for bags and racks, this bike is built for multi-day bikepacking adventures or high-speed gravel grinding. Wide tire clearances allow you to customize your ride for any path.

specs.Frame: Superlight Alloy, flat mount disc, fender/rack eyelets

features: Flared drop handlebars for enhanced stability and control
Shimano GRX gravel-specific groupset and clutch derailleur
Generous frame mounts for bikepacking bags, bottles, and racks
Generous tire clearance (up to 700x45c or 650bx50)

name: Urbanite Classic Sport
shortDescription: A beautiful, minimalist single-speed bicycle crafted for stylish and maintenance-free city riding.
description: The Urbanite Classic Sport captures the spirit of traditional European city bikes, updated with modern lightweight materials. With a clean single-speed drivetrain and premium leather touchpoints, it is the perfect companion for short commutes, weekend cafe runs, and flat city streets.

specs.Frame: Chromoly Steel (Cr-Mo) Double Butted classic frame
specs.Drivetrain: Single speed with flip-flop hub (fixed gear / freewheel)

features: Double-butted Cr-Mo frame for a smooth, vibration-dampening ride
Flip-flop hub allows easy switching between fixed gear and freewheel
Genuine leather saddle and matching hand-stitched grips
Highly durable, low-maintenance components ideal for city living

name: Veloce Gran Tourer
shortDescription: Ultra-premium endurance road bike built for all-day comfort and long-distance speed.
description: The Veloce Gran Tourer is built for those who define cycling by the horizon, not the clock. Combining endurance-tuned geometry with custom carbon compliance technologies, it isolates you from road vibration while maintaining raw drivetrain efficiency, allowing you to ride further and faster with less fatigue.

specs.Frame: Veloce SL Carbon, endurance geometry, integrated compliance
specs.Fork: Veloce SL Carbon, active dampening insert
specs.Drivetrain: SRAM Force eTap AXS 2x12 wireless electronic

features: SRAM Force eTap AXS fully wireless electronic groupset
Active-compliance frame inserts to reduce road buzz and vibrations
35mm tubeless-ready carbon wheels with high-engagement hubs
Endurance-oriented geometry for comfortable neck, shoulder, and back alignment
